label: M4_DCM-AdminTools
info:
Backend flows for Access Control & Admin Tools.

MongoDB collections:
  - users
  - roles

Operations:
  - getAdminTools: list all users
  - inviteUser: create/invite a user
  - updateUser: update user roles/access
  - deleteUser: remove a user

SRS Requirements covered:
  FR-AC-01: User Roles - CRUD for Asset Crawler, Schema Registry, Catalogue Registry access

name: ══ Admin Tools & Access Control Backend (FR-AC-01) ══
info:
Handles user management and role-based access control.
FR-AC-01: Define user roles that allow/deny accessing:
  - Asset Crawler operations
  - Schema Registry CRUD
  - Catalogue Registry CRUD

Responses go back to Dashboard uibuilder via link-out → dashboard-linkin.

name: getAdminTools
inviteUser
updateUser
deleteUser
